display_text: Storm Spirit Aghanim's Scepter: Electric Vortex affects all enemies within a radius around Storm Spirit. This upgrade provides strong AoE control, countering grouped enemy formations and enabling multi-hero disables during team fights, enhancing Storm Spirit's initiation and crowd control potential.
search_text: Storm Spirit Aghanim Scepter AoE control multi-hero disable team fight initiation crowd control

display_text: Storm Spirit Aghanim's Shard: Grants Storm Spirit and nearby allies 3 Overload charges with bonus Attack Speed. This upgrade counters prolonged engagements by providing burst damage potential, transforming Storm Spirit into a teamfight enabler who can quickly amplify allied right-click damage.
search_text: Storm Spirit Aghanim Shard Overload charges attack speed burst damage teamfight enabler right-click damage
